{{ include "jarvy-telemetry-forwarder.fullname" . }} installed in namespace {{ .Release.Namespace }}.

What was installed:
  • OpenTelemetry Collector Deployment + Service (port 4318)
  • Anonymize-not-drop pipeline (salted SHA-256 over hashedAttributes)
  • {{ if .Values.gatewayApi.enabled }}Gateway API HTTPRoute for {{ join ", " .Values.gatewayApi.httpRoute.hostnames }}{{ else }}NO Gateway API resources (gatewayApi.enabled=false){{ end }}
  • {{ if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled }}NetworkPolicy locking ingress + egress{{ else }}NO NetworkPolicy (networkPolicy.enabled=false){{ end }}
  • {{ if .Values.serviceMonitor.enabled }}ServiceMonitor for kube-prometheus-stack{{ else }}NO ServiceMonitor (serviceMonitor.enabled=false){{ end }}

Verify end-to-end:

  1. Probes:
     curl -I https://{{ index .Values.gatewayApi.httpRoute.hostnames 0 }}/v1/logs
     # Expect HTTP/2 405 (method filter) or 404 (route mismatch)

     curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
       -d '{"resourceLogs":[]}' \
       https://{{ index .Values.gatewayApi.httpRoute.hostnames 0 }}/v1/logs
     # Expect HTTP/2 200

  2. Synthetic Jarvy event:
     JARVY_TELEMETRY=1 \
     JARVY_OTLP_ENDPOINT=https://{{ index .Values.gatewayApi.httpRoute.hostnames 0 }} \
     jarvy --version

  3. Anonymization spot check (in your backend's logs query):
     resource.host.name must be a 64-char hex string, NOT a hostname.
     If it's plaintext, the salt is missing — check the PII_SALT env in
     `kubectl describe deploy {{ include "jarvy-telemetry-forwarder.fullname" . }} -n {{ .Release.Namespace }}`.

{{ if eq .Values.secrets.strategy "inline" -}}
⚠  secrets.strategy=inline is set. The Grafana write token and PII
   salt are stored as Kubernetes Secrets created from chart values.
   For production, switch to externalSecrets and a real secret
   backend.
{{- end }}

{{ if not .Values.gatewayApi.traefikMiddlewares.enabled -}}
Note: traefikMiddlewares is disabled. Make sure your HTTPRoute
`extraFilters` provide equivalent body-size limit and rate limit, or
this forwarder is unprotected against runaway clients.
{{- end }}

Operational guide:
  https://jarvy.dev/operations/telemetry-forwarder/
